text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It's getting late, so maybe I'll just go<n>ahead and
buy lunch at the school<n>store today... hm?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Ohhh! Those two were literally justfighting and now they're outsideeating sandwiches together?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I... I have to get close for a better look!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Not only has Agnes Digital failed to<n>spy on
Umamusume, she's also<n>missed her chance to
eat lunch.
